articles.title: GTA 6 delayed to November 2026
articles.summary: GTA 6 was delayed. It will now launch November 19, 2026.
articles.impact: Fans will wait longer for the new GTA 6 game.

articles.title: PlayStation Plus June games revealed
articles.summary: Sony revealed June's PS Plus games. An Xbox game is featured. This is for subscribers.
articles.impact: PS Plus members get new games to play next month.

articles.title: PlayStation Days of Play sales start
articles.summary: PlayStation sales begin tomorrow. Get deals on games. The sale runs until June 10.
articles.impact: PlayStation offers discounts on games and memberships.

articles.title: NVIDIA Control Panel retiring
articles.summary: NVIDIA is retiring its Control Panel. It served users for 20 years. A new app replaces it.
articles.impact: NVIDIA updates its software for GeForce users.

articles.title: Destiny 2 live service ending
articles.summary: Destiny 2's live service is ending. No new content will come. Servers will stay on.
articles.impact: Destiny 2 will not get new updates or content.

articles.title: Pokémon GO Forever Forward Season starts
articles.summary: Pokémon GO's Forever Forward Season is here. It features GO Fest and Mega Pokémon. The season ends September 8.
articles.impact: Players get new Pokémon GO events and features.

articles.title: Classic Pokémon style game on Switch
articles.summary: A game like classic Pokémon is out. It's on the Nintendo Switch. Indie developers made it.
articles.impact: Play a new game like old Pokémon.

articles.title: AI music app Suno divides users
articles.summary: People use Suno to make music. Some users ditch Spotify for it. It makes AI songs.
articles.impact: AI music generation is changing how people listen.
